'''tamasa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jharna|jharna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jharna|jharna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tamasa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmæsæth|tæmæsæth]] || [[word:tæmæsæj|tæmæsæj]] || [[word:tæmæsæsh|tæmæsæsh]] || [[word:tæmæsæ|tæmæsæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamamasath|tamamasath]] || [[word:tamamasaj|tamamasaj]] || [[word:tamamasash|tamamasash]] || [[word:tamamasa|tamamasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamasath|tamasath]] || [[word:tamasaj|tamasaj]] || [[word:tamasash|tamasash]] || [[word:tamasa|tamasa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamafsath|tamafsath]] || [[word:tamafsaj|tamafsaj]] || [[word:tamafsash|tamafsash]] || [[word:tamafsaf|tamafsaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamasatha|tamasatha]] || [[word:tamasaja|tamasaja]] || [[word:tamasasha|tamasasha]] || [[word:tamasaka|tamasaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamasath|tamasath]] || [[word:tamasaj|tamasaj]] || [[word:tamasash|tamasash]] || [[word:tamasa|tamasa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamasathal|tamasathal]] || [[word:tamasajal|tamasajal]] || [[word:tamasashal|tamasashal]] || [[word:tamasakal|tamasakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamasathatha|tamasathatha]] || [[word:tamasajaja|tamasajaja]] || [[word:tamasashasha|tamasashasha]] || [[word:tamasaka|tamasaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamasathan|tamasathan]] || [[word:tamasajan|tamasajan]] || [[word:tamasashan|tamasashan]] || [[word:tamasakan|tamasakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamasathaoro|tamasathaoro]] || [[word:tamasajaoro|tamasajaoro]] || [[word:tamasashaoro|tamasashaoro]] || [[word:tamasakaoro|tamasakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
